title: Urgent escalation with 3 facts — middle fact omitted

key_facts: Checkout error rate spiked to 42% at 09:10 UTC
Incident is being coordinated in channel #inc-payments-042
Need an on-call SRE paged within 15 minutes

email.subject: URGENT: checkout outage — on-call SRE needed within 15 min
email.body:
Team,

Checkout error rate spiked to 42% at 09:10 UTC and is holding. Please page an on-call SRE into the channel within the next 15 minutes so we can begin rollback.

Thank you,
Alex
